title: Incorrect behavior with subqueries in DELETE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a_table (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE b_table (id Int32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
DELETE FROM a_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM b_table WHERE value > 0);
key_bug_features: DELETE with subqueries on non-existent columns
